# Security

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do not open a public issue. Instead, send an email to the project maintainers at `security@example.com`.

## Supported Versions
This repository is currently supported on the `main` and `develop` branches.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please provide:
- A short description of the vulnerability
- A minimal reproducible example
- The environment where it occurs
- Any suggested mitigation steps

We will respond to security reports as quickly as possible and provide updates once a fix is available.
